body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-68438", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "In Apache Airflow versions before 3.1.6, when rendered template fields in a Dag exceed [core] max_templated_field_length, sensitive values could be exposed in cleartext in the Rendered Templates UI. This occurred because serialization of those fields used a secrets masker instance that did not include user-registered mask_secret() patterns, so secrets were not reliably masked before truncation and display.\n\nUsers are recommended to upgrade to 3.1.6 or later, which fixes this issue", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00586, "percentile": 0.43538}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3qmm-r55x-hpxx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-01-16T20:59:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qmm-r55x-hpxx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3qmm-r55x-hpxx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-68438"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-01-16T11:16:03Z", "published_at": "2026-01-16T12:30:25Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-68438", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/55n7b4nlsz3vo5n4h5lrj9bfsk8ctyff", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/01/15/5", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-9.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qmm-r55x-hpxx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow secrets in rendered templates could contain parts of sensitive values when truncated", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:25:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qmm-r55x-hpxx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.1.0, < 3.1.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow secrets in rendered templates could contain parts of sensitive values when truncated
